message:
refactor(evaluator): remove mock pattern types from tests (1g6)

Eliminate MockSafePattern and MockDestructivePattern structs from
evaluator tests in favor of exercising real pack-based patterns.

Changes:
- Remove mock struct definitions and LegacySafePattern/LegacyDestructivePattern trait impls
- Rename parity_* tests to evaluator_* (simpler, clearer naming)
- Remove evaluate_command_with_legacy calls from tests (no longer testing legacy path)
- Remove legacy_patterns_cause_expected_divergence test (mock-only)
- Remove unused Regex import from test module

The tests now exercise the production code path using real patterns from REGISTRY,
improving test fidelity and reducing mock maintenance burden.

Closes: git_safety_guard-1g6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
